description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure dressed in a form-fitting, armored outfit that covers the torso, arms, and legs. The individual wears a full head mask with only the eyes exposed, and the mask features a small emblem on the forehead. The torso is protected by segmented, padded armor plates, and the arms are adorned with bracers and wristbands. The pants are tight and reinforced with additional padding, while the boots are sturdy and designed for urban movement. Notable details include a tattoo on the upper left arm and a utility belt at the waist, suggesting a combat or vigilante role.
description: A muscular adult male in a padded, armored suit with a full head mask, bracers, and boots, featuring a tattoo and utility belt.
description_view_0: Front view shows the armored chest, full head mask, utility belt, and bracers on both arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm bracer, tattoo on the upper arm, and the profile of the mask.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the segmented back armor, the back of the mask, and the reinforced pants.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the arm bracer and the clean profile of the suit without a tattoo.
attribute_clothing_type: armored bodysuit with padded vest, bracers, utility belt, and reinforced pants
